{"id":"project-LICHEN-pn1f","title":"simulation.py: callback-based RX misses metrics/observers","description":"File: python/src/lichen/sim/simulation.py
Lines: 736-781

_get_rx_result_internal() (used by deliver_pending_packets for push-based RX) does not:
1. Record successful receptions in metrics (line 854 only in get_rx_result)
2. Record collisions in metrics (lines 831-851 only in get_rx_result)
3. Notify observers of rx_success or collision events

This means when using RX_ENTER/RX_EXIT (push-based RX mode), metrics are incomplete and WebSocket observers miss events. The duplicate code paths should be unified.

Impact: Metrics dashboard shows incorrect reception/collision counts; real-time WebSocket clients miss events in push mode.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:27:24.964824Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:27:24.964863Z"}
